'''Obba Babatundé''' (born [[December 1]], [[1950s|1951]]) is an American actor who voices [[Landonis Balthazar Calrissian|Lando Calrissian]] in ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'', ''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron II: Rogue Leader]]'', ''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron III: Rebel Strike]]'' and ''[[Disney Infinity 3.0]]''.
